texto: It should be clear by now that my focus here is not freedom of speech or the press. This freedom is all too often an exaggeration. At the very least, blind references to freedom of speech or the press serve as a distraction from the critical examination of other communications policies.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Mark Lloyd sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “It should be clear by now that my focus here is not freedom of speech or the press. This freedom …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, focus, blind, útil em momentos de estudos e blind.

At the very least, blind references to freedom of speech or the press serve as a distraction from the critical examination of other communications policies.
